game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **리틀베리숲이야기 (Little Berry Forest Story):** Players explore a hand-drawn, story-rich world, interacting with unique characters to progress through a narrative that unfolds over approximately 3 hours of gameplay. The core loop involves navigating the environment via tap-to-move controls, engaging in various mini-games, and participating in a cooking system where collected ingredients are combined to create "cute dishes." Progression is primarily driven by advancing the character-focused story, unlocking new interactions and potentially new areas as the narrative unfolds. Mini-games offer distinct challenges, while the cooking system requires players to discover recipes and gather specific ingredients to prepare meals. The game emphasizes a relaxed, non-competitive experience with no explicit win or loss conditions, focusing instead on exploration and narrative enjoyment.
game_info.description: Welcome to Little Berry Forest! You are a young explorer in a magical forest filled with adorable characters and delicious berries. Your goal is to meet all the forest friends, collect ingredients, cook dishes using recipes, and complete mini-game challenges. Explore the forest by moving around, interact with characters to unlock their stories, gather berries and ingredients, and discover new recipes. Complete all character interactions and cook at least 5 unique dishes to win!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character around the forest
Space: Interact with characters, pick up items, and confirm actions in cooking/mini-games
Z: Open/close cooking menu when near the cooking station
Shift: Sprint (move faster)
Enter: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
R: Return to start screen (restart)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and interaction testing. This test validates that the player can move around the forest, interact with objects, and that the game state updates correctly. It tests fundamental mechanics like position tracking and collision detection.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player in various directions using arrow keys, attempt to interact with different objects using Space, and verify that the player's position changes appropriately. Test boundary conditions by moving to edges of the canvas.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should move smoothly in all directions, stay within canvas bounds, and interact with objects when pressing Space near them. Position data should be logged correctly, and no errors should occur during movement or interaction.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition testing. This test implements an optimal strategy to complete the game by interacting with all characters, collecting ingredients, and cooking the required number of dishes. It validates that the win condition is properly triggered.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate to each character in sequence, interact with them to unlock their stories, collect berries and ingredients throughout the forest, visit the cooking station, and prepare at least 5 different dishes using discovered recipes. Complete any mini-games that appear.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state after all character interactions are complete and at least 5 dishes have been cooked. The win screen should display with appropriate congratulatory message and final statistics.

TEST_3.test_description: Recipe discovery and cooking system testing. This test validates the cooking mechanics, recipe unlocking, ingredient collection, and dish preparation systems. It ensures the cooking UI works correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Collect various ingredients by walking over them, interact with characters to unlock recipes, open the cooking menu at the cooking station, select recipes, and attempt to cook dishes with both sufficient and insufficient ingredients.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Recipes should unlock as characters are met, ingredients should be added to inventory when collected, cooking should only succeed with correct ingredients, and the dish counter should increment properly. UI should display available recipes and ingredient requirements clearly.

TEST_4.test_description: Mini-game completion testing. This test validates that mini-games trigger correctly, can be completed successfully, and provide appropriate rewards. It tests the mini-game state transitions.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Trigger mini-games by interacting with specific characters or objects, complete the mini-game challenges using appropriate controls, and verify rewards are granted upon success.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Mini-games should start when triggered, display clear instructions, respond to player inputs, detect win/loss conditions correctly, grant rewards on success, and return to exploration mode when complete.
